title: Kenyan Stew with Gooey Dumplings
description: A hearty stew recipe from Kenya, served with gooey dumplings that add a sweet twist to the traditional dish.

ingredients.name: Gooey Dumpling Dough
ingredients.notes: Combine 1 cup all-purpose flour, 1/2 cup cornstarch, 1/4 cup sugar, 1/4 cup vegetable oil

ingredients.name: Kenyan Stew Meat
ingredients.notes: Use beef or lamb for a more authentic flavor

ingredients.name: Chilli Peppers
ingredients.notes: Red or green chillies work well for this recipe

ingredients.name: Quedo Cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional, but adds a rich flavor to the stew

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: Chopped or sliced, whichever suits the stew's texture

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Minced or crushed, depending on your preference

ingredients.name: Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Canned or fresh, whichever is available

ingredients.name: Vegetable Broth
ingredients.notes: Chicken broth works well too, but use vegetable broth for a vegetarian option

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Don't overdo it – the stew's flavors will balance out

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground for the best flavor

instructions: 1. Cut the stew meat into bite-sized pieces and season with salt and black pepper.
2. Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat and cook the stew meat until browned.
3. Add the chopped onions and cook until they're translucent.
4. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
5. Add the chopped chilli peppers and cook for another minute.
6. Add the stew meat, tomatoes, vegetable broth, and quedo cheese (if using).
7. Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30-40 minutes.
8. While the stew is cooking, prepare the gooey dumpling dough.
9. Roll out the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
10. When the stew is ready, add the dumplings and cook for another 10-15 minutes, until they're cooked through.
11. Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
